## Risk Level

Choose one:

- [ ] Low: docs / visual-only
- [ ] Medium: user-facing behavior
- [ ] High: payment, auth, Firebase rules, orders, users, spins, discounts

## Verification

- [ ] `node --check script.js`
- [ ] Inline scripts parse: `admin.html`, `orders.html`, `spin.html`
- [ ] Manual checkout test
- [ ] Manual admin order test
- [ ] Firebase rules reviewed/deployed if changed

## AI Handshake

- [ ] Not needed
- [ ] `.handshake/01_codex_packet.md` filled
- [ ] External review captured in `.handshake/02_external_review.md`
- [ ] Codex response captured in `.handshake/03_codex_response.md`
- [ ] `.handshake/04_decision.md` is `APPROVED`
